title: Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple
tagline: Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple (ஆச்சாள்புரம் சிவலோகத்தியாகர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located in Achalpuram village, in the Kollidam block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil
overview.description: Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple (ஆச்சாள்புரம் சிவலோகத்தியாகர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located in Achalpuram village, in the Kollidam block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Shivalokathyagar. His consort is known as Tiruvennetru Umaiammai.

topPlaces.name: Kollidam, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Kollidam (also spelled Koḷḷiṭam in Tamil), formerly known as Coleroon is a panchayat town and headquarters of the Kollidam revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The name derived from the settlement named after the Kollidam River, the northern distributary of the river Cauvery.

topPlaces.name: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple
topPlaces.description: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple (மகேந்திரப்பள்ளி திருமேனியழகர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Mahendirapalli in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Palvannanathar and his consort is known as Vedanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Erukkur
topPlaces.description: Erukkur is a village located nearby Sirkazhi in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located just 10 km from the Bay of Bengal; 5 km from Kollidam; 20 km from Chidambaram; 250 km from Chennai and 80 km from Pondicherry.

topPlaces.name: Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple (also called Thirunelvayil) is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is also known as Thirunelvayil.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple of the god Shiva located at Chidambaram in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Pasupatheswarar, along with His consort known as Satgunambal and Nalla Nayaki.

topPlaces.name: Kodiyampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kodiyampalayam (Tamil: [koɖijampaːʎajam], ISO: Koṭiyam-pāḷaiyam), is a continental island surrounded by Mangrove forests, located in Mayiladuthurai district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The island situated at the mouth of Kollidam river, a northern distributary of the Cauvery River.

topPlaces.name: Annamalai Nagar
topPlaces.description: Annamalai Nagar is a special grade Panchayat town in Cuddalore district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The town is named after Annamalai Chettiar, an Indian businessperson, educationist and philanthropist.

items.note: Kollidam (also spelled Koḷḷiṭam in Tamil), formerly known as Coleroon is a panchayat town and headquarters of the Kollidam revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The name derived from the settlement named after the Kollidam River, the northern distributary of the river Cauvery.

Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Palvannanathar and his consort is known as Vedanayaki.

Erukkur is a village located nearby Sirkazhi in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located just 10 km from the Bay of Bengal; 5 km from Kollidam; 20 km from Chidambaram; 250 km from Chennai and 80 km from Pondicherry.
Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple (also called Thirunelvayil) is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is also known as Thirunelvayil.

Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple of the god Shiva located at Chidambaram in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Pasupatheswarar, along with His consort known as Satgunambal and Nalla Nayaki.

Kodiyampalayam (Tamil: [koɖijampaːʎajam], ISO: Koṭiyam-pāḷaiyam), is a continental island surrounded by Mangrove forests, located in Mayiladuthurai district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The island situated at the mouth of Kollidam river, a northern distributary of the Cauvery River.

Annamalai Nagar is a special grade Panchayat town in Cuddalore district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The town is named after Annamalai Chettiar, an Indian businessperson, educationist and philanthropist.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (130 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kollidam, Mayiladuthurai, Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple, Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple, Erukkur, Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple.
